---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

Describe the problem or workflow gap this feature would address.
_Example: "When working across multiple machines, I want to..."_

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Expected behavior

What the output or user experience should look like after the feature is implemented.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or any other context that helps explain the request.
